tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Live Like We're Dying - Kris Allen
Standard Tuning
Capo on 5th

[tab]Chords Used:
    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
E|----3-----3----3----3--|
B|----3-----3----3----3--|
G|----0-----2----0----0--|
D|----2-----0----0----2--|
A|----3-----0----2----2--|
E|----x-----2----3----x--|[/tab]

Listen to song for strumming pattern and timing
Intro
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch], [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

Verse
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Sometimes we fall down, can't get back up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
We're hiding behind skin that's too tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Till it's too late.... it's not too late[/tab]
(same for all verses)


Chorus
Yeah, we gotta start
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
Looking at the hands of the time we've been given[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
If this is all we got and we gotta start thinking[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Turn it all around or to throw it all away[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
While we got the chance to say[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Gotta live like we're dying[/tab]
(repeat for each chorus)
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]   
Like we're dying, oh.. like we're dying[/tab]

Bridge
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
You never know a good thing till it's gone[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
You never see a crash till it's head on[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Why do we think we're right when we're dead wrong[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
You never know a good thing till it's gone[/tab]

Hope this helps 

Full Lyrics:
Sometimes we fall down, can't get back up
We're hiding behind skin that's too tough
How come we don't say I love you enough
Till it's to late, it's not too late

Our hearts are hungry for a food that won't come
And we could make a feast from these crumbs
And we're all staring down the barrel of a gun
So if your life flashed before you,
What would you wish you would've done

Yeah, we gotta start
Looking at the hands of the time we've been given
If this is all we got and we gotta start thinking
If every second counts on a clock that's ticking
Gotta live like we're dying

We only got 86,400 seconds in a day to
Turn it all around or to throw it all away
We gotta tell them that we love them
While we got the chance to say
Gotta live like we're dying

And if your plane fell out of the skies
Who would you call with your last goodbye
Should be so careful who we live out our lives
So when we long for absolution,
There'll no one on the line, yeah

Yeah, we gotta start
Looking at the hands of the time we've been given
If this is all we got and we gotta start thinking
If every second counts on a clock that's ticking
Gotta live like we're dying

We only got 86,400 seconds in a day to
Turn it all around or to throw it all away
We gotta tell them that we love them
While we got the chance to say
Gotta live like we're dying

Like we're dying, oh, like we're dying..

We only got 86,400 seconds in a day to
Turn it all around or to throw it all away
We gotta tell them that we love them
While we got the chance to say
Gotta live like we're dying

You never know a good thing till it's gone
You never see a crash till it's head on
Why do we think we're right when we're dead wrong
You never know a good thing till it's gone

Yeah, we gotta start
Looking at the hands of the time we've been given
If this is all we got and we gotta start thinking
If every second counts on a clock that's ticking
Gotta live like we're dying
